title: RESIDENTIAL CARE - 211info
text: ALBERTINA KERR RESIDENTIAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides homes for youth with complex needs, supporting social and emotional growth. Residents have private bedrooms and share common areas. Staff help with daily self-care and teach independent living skills, while licensed clinicians provide mental health and behavioral health support. Residents work on goals, coping skills, and self-advocacy in a supportive environment. The program does not offer 2:1 or 1:1 caregiver-to-resident staffing ratios. 424 NE 22nd Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 7-17 with developmental disabilities and mental health challenges Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 239-8101 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 239-8101 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake or contact local community developmental disabilities program FEES: OHP Verity DOCUMENTS: Intake screener may ask for child's name, date of birth, guardian information, insurance information, current behaviors of concern, past mental health treatment, current medications, and current treatment providers LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Placements for Children and Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - I/DD EMPLOYMENT SERVICES EMPLOYMENT - VOCATIONAL SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INCLUSIVE DAY SERVICES LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ADULT GROUP HOMES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBERTINA KERR
